fragmentation method: twelve data-dependent high-energy collisional dissociations were performed
instrument: Data were acquired using a Thermo Fisher Q-Exactive™ Plus Hybrid Quadrupole-Orbitrap™ Plus mass spectrometer
ionization type: loop injected into the electrospray ion source
labeling: samples were normalized by protein content, and lipids were extracted according to the Bligh & Dyer method
